title: More Nonsense Limerick 33
content:
There was an old lady of France,
    Who taught little ducklings to dance;
    When she said, "Tick-a-tack!"
    They only said, "Quack!"
    Which grieved that old lady of France.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Edward Lear delivers a powerful performance in "More Nonsense Limerick 33"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
